content:
I used Gnostic Advance on the level uncap screen for an Awakener, clicked on one of the materials needed → Material Synthesis, which takes me to the Foundry screen.

From there, I clicked on "Pale Files" (the material needed to craft Pale Tomes), and then clicked on Material Synthesis. 

Expected:
- It shows me the Synthesis screen for "Pale Files" now instead

Actual:
- The Synthesis screen goes entirely blank, and stays that way even if I switch to Material Conversion or Covenant Dismantle and then go back (see attached video)

content:
The descriptions of Soulforge talents are incorrectly displaying the descriptions for other awakeners. For eg: Daffodils soulforge description is showing Ryker's details, Ryker's description is showing Lily's details, Lily's description is showing Karen's details, and so on. 
See screenshots for examples.
thread_title: Soulforge Talent descriptions are incorrectly displaying other awakener details

content: I have a quick question about mechanics. Why do Twice Posse and Tawil's Posse only count as a single stack for Gramona and 24 Chaos's passives? Shouldn't Twice Posse count as a double proc, and Tawil's Posse count as selecting another pose within the Posse?"

Speculation from how I understand it

- Silver Key Dawn: You cast the posse once, the effects just happen to double. 

- Tawil: Her posse just essentially becomes "Chosen Posse + Keyflare". It's not really casting another Posse so much as it is yoinking the effects like her Exalt does with cards.

A few ideas i'd like to see in the game

1. Training mode. Simply dummy pretty please <:please:1356053110375714817> 

The game's difficulty increases along with players skill levels, but we still don't have a training ground to see how some parts of game work. Most often, we have to test in dtide or Story Mode, which isn't the best place for testing

2. More cosmetics for a donation
Pfp, emoute, avatar frame

3. Black Offering  
dtide is already a familiar, updated content for all players, but what if you can't complete it? You're simply losing important currency and depriving yourself of access to 4 SSR and a lot SR wheels. It would be great to be able to get them regardless of whether you've completed dtide or not(d-jewel on black offering) 

4. New endgame content
Many 3d gacha games have "Tower", where our tower? xdx One fight(like elite fight in story mode), no relics, no gnosis, at each new stage new enemies appear and their level increases. What about reward? Pure cores and some resource <:question2:1356053130336272414>  Every 5(?) stages elite fight, every 10(?) stages final boss fight(from every arcs(On the lower floors there are arc1 bosses, on the floors above there are bosses from all arcs) and 5-10(?) pure cores. There is also a leaderboard with those who climbed to the highest level

4. hear me out. (basically like Train x P-Dive)

Mystery dungeon
https://tenor.com/view/breakdance-of-time-pmd-pokemon-mystery-dungeon-riolu-gif-13361005654725912571
https://tenor.com/view/chisa-cute-cat-wuthering-waves-wuwa-gif-14610985499139092655

Personal opinion counter point, 

repetitive tower modes make me want to eat lead. I'd rather have some designed gameplay then that.
We already have the dredge that is hard mode at times.
Off the topic but I like your art
I took these from pixiv, here is the link to the original author https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/130159904 <:please:1356053110375714817>

I alt-tabbed out of the game after killing the first wave of adds in LvL65 arcane dominion. When i tabbed back, my cards were somehow playing themselves and it had progressed to the last phase.
I have no idea what caused this, and i dont like it even if it provides advantage.

There was one other anomoly: at the heal/rouse space, the healing option was replaced with the word "poise"

I am running on Ubuntu
I was alt tabbing to a youtube playlist in firefox.
Also open were an active discord call and oldschool runescape.

Morimens had been open since before the day tick, tabbing all around the whole time.
your game is haunted 👻
ya...
that checks out.

5월 18일 업데이트 이후 망각편 스토리 번역에 문제가 생겼습니다.
스토리는 망각편 9부까지 손번역이 적용됐습니다.
그러나 5월 18일 업데이트 이후로 망각편 5장부터 옛날의 GPT번역으로 출력되고있습니다.



After the May 18 update, an issue occurred with the translation of the Oblivion Arc story.

The story had manual translations applied up to Oblivion Arc Part 9.
However, after the May 18 update, the story from Oblivion Arc Chapter 5 onward is being displayed using the old GPT translation again.



5月18日更新后，忘却篇剧情翻译出现了问题。

忘却篇第9部之前原本都已经应用了人工翻译。
但是在5月18日更新之后，从忘却篇第5章开始，又重新显示成了以前的GPT机翻版本。




해결해 주시면 감사하겠습니다.
I'd appreciate it if you could solve it.
请帮我解决，谢谢。
<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

I checked with Korean users.

The official Korean translation team had translated up to Chapter 6, and user translations had been applied up to Chapter 9.
It seems that, after this update, an issue occurred where the GPT-translated files started being applied from Chapter 6 onward.

content:
如果可以跟列車一樣中途離場之後回來 隊伍數值完全不變 這就好多了
其實中斷關卡應該不是辦不到？如果遊戲閃退之類的 之後重開還是會從上次進行中的戰鬥繼續 所以我想這個功能是合理的
畢竟派遣任務是計時的 能越早開始下一輪派遣對玩家來說越好

還有如果在關卡裡面打太久 會發生在線維護後的兩小時禮包直接消失 這個感覺很不好
希望這個禮包可以改成維護後抵達首頁時觸發 而不是如果仍在關卡中就直接觸發 然後開始計時 然後我出關卡他就已經過期了
雖然只是體力跟金券 但還有總是好
